title: Heart Crosshair
description: your crosshair a heart with a dot in the center
body:
makes your crosshair a heart with a dot in the center 

its just a crosshair nothing else if you make sure its at the top of your resource pack list than your crosshair will be a heart even if other texture packs you use change your crosshair

the pack format is 1.20.4 so it might say you it is for an older version but it will still work with any verson
